zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Hedwig St Liz於大約1135年出生在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓時，她的父親Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton39歲，母親Isabelle de Beaumont16歲。她於1160年與William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1171年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Hedwig St Liz于大约1135年出生在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓时，她的父亲Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton39岁，母亲Isabelle de Beaumont16岁。她于1160年与William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1171年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Liz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from Liz in Lugo province, Galicia (Spain). As a Hispanic name it may also be an altered form of   Lis  . Compare   Deliz  .

variants.name: Lis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Stanislaw, Wladyslaw, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignatius, Malgorzata, Slawomir, Tadeusz, Tomasz, Boleslaw, Bronislaw, Darek.

Polish, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Polish and Czech dialect lis ‘fox’, Upper Sorbian lis ‘he-fox’, a nickname for a cunning person or, in the case of the Jewish name, an artificial name. The presumably cognate Sorbian surname Liš is found in Germanized and probably also Americanized forms, only (see Liesch and Lish ). Compare also Lese , Lies , and Liss .
Czech: nickname for a man with a bald pate, from a variant of the adjective lysý ‘bald’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Hedwig St Liz was born about 1135, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, was 39 and her mother, Isabelle de Beaumont, was 16. She married William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope in 1160, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1171, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Hedwig St Liz est née environ 1135, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Beaumont, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope en 1160, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1171, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Hedwig St Liz um 1135 in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton 39 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Beaumont 16. Sie hat 1160 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1171 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hedwig St Liz è nata il circa 1135 nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Beaumont, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope nel 1160, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1171, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Hedwig St Lizが約1135年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで生まれた時，父Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northamptonは39歳，母Isabelle de Beaumontは16歳であった。1160年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペでWilliam Mauduit Baron of Hanslopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1171年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Hedwig St Liz(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Beaumont(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1171년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Hedwig St Liz nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Beaumont, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope em 1160, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1171, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Hedwig St Liz родилась около 1135 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Beaumont, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope в 1160 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1171 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Hedwig St Liz nació aproximadamente 1135, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Beaumont, tenía 16 años. Se casó con William Mauduit Baron of Hanslope en 1160, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1171, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
